name: Preacher Curl
resistance_profile: Arm-forward position loads the short head hard in the stretched bottom.
cues: Upper arms flat on the pad
Don't fully relax at the bottom under heavy load
execution_steps: Sit at the preacher bench and rest the backs of your upper arms flat on the angled pad.
Grip the bar or handles underhand and let the arms extend toward the bottom.
Curl up until your forearms are near vertical, keeping the elbows down on the pad.
Lower under control to a near-full stretch, staying in control at the bottom under heavy load.
good_when: You want a stretched-position emphasis with the arms braced against a pad.
You want to remove momentum and body english entirely.
bad_when: Fully relaxing at the stretched bottom bothers your elbows under heavy load.
You want constant tension at the top (the contracted position unloads on a preacher).
common_errors: Lifting the elbows off the pad
